\tzpentry{ID5139}{Delta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5139 introduces Delta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(\\delta^{\\mathrm{t}}\\phi=\\nabla^{\\mathrm{t}}\\_{a}\\nabla^{\\mathrm{t}a}\\phi\\)
\]
